name: Hunan Hot Pepper & Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Each dry sherry and sesame oil
1 1/2 tablespoons Fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar or bowl, combine the oil, crushed red pepper, fermented black beans, minced garlic, dry sherry, sesame oil, and salt.
2. Cover tightly with foil.
3. Place the jar on a rack over simmering water. Make sure it is covered and steamed for 45 minutes.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely before covering and refrigerating indefinitely.
5. Serve at room temperature.
Makes 1/2 cup
